incidents.title: Netflix Billing Scam Email
incidents.raw_report: got an email saying my netflix was suspended click here to update payment. looked fake

incidents.title: Catalytic Converter Theft
incidents.raw_report: my neighbor had their catalytic converter stolen overnight on elm street. third one this week

incidents.title: Local Gym Data Breach
incidents.raw_report: FitLife gym sent email saying member data was exposed including names emails and partial credit cards

incidents.title: IRS Tax Season Robocall
incidents.raw_report: got a call saying irs will arrest me if i dont pay $500 in gift cards immediately. classic scam right?

incidents.title: Water Main Break — Oak Street
incidents.raw_report: massive water main break on oak and 5th. road closed. traffic backed up for blocks
action_checklist: Use alternate route via Main Blvd

incidents.title: Fake Windows Security Alert Popup
incidents.raw_report: my mom got a popup saying her computer was infected and to call microsoft support number. she almost called

incidents.title: Porch Piracy Surge
incidents.raw_report: someone stole amazon packages from 3 houses on my street today caught on ring camera

incidents.title: Rogue WiFi Hotspot at Coffee Shop
incidents.raw_report: saw a wifi network called 'BrewHouse_Free' at brewhouse cafe but the real one is 'BrewHouse_Guest'. classic evil twin attack
action_checklist: Always verify WiFi name with staff

incidents.title: Utility Impersonation Scam
incidents.raw_report: man knocked on door saying he was from PG&E needed to check meter or power would be cut. asked for cash to clear debt. fake!
action_checklist: Call utility company directly to verify
Do not let in without verification

incidents.title: Romance Scam Targeting Seniors
incidents.raw_report: my grandmother was almost scammed by someone on facebook claiming to be a military officer. asked for gift cards for flight home
action_checklist: Never send money to someone you haven't met
Report to FBI IC3 at ic3.gov

noise_filtered.raw: ugh my neighbor parks in front of my house AGAIN so annoying i hate living here
the city takes forever to fix potholes typical government incompetence!!!!!
anyone know a good plumber? my sink is leaking
noise_filtered.reason: Service request, not a safety incident

meta.note: All data is entirely fabricated for demonstration purposes. No real incidents or personal data.
